overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character traversing a foggy forest at dawn. The character walks along a wooden boardwalk before running onto a dirt path, using a flashlight to navigate the dense, misty woodland as they approach and pass a small red shed.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden boardwalk through the foggy forest, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank path winding through the forest
rustic wooden post fence running alongside the path
white-barked birch trees with sparse autumn leaves
dense fog obscuring the distant tree line

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden boardwalk path winding through a foggy birch forest. A wooden fence lines the left side while white birch trunks stand out against the misty green undergrowth.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running
leaves wooden boardwalk and steps onto natural dirt forest path

agents.ego_description: breaking into a run as the path transitions from wooden planks to dirt terrain, moving deeper into the denser forest

entered.detail: narrow dirt path through tall grass and undergrowth
tall dark pine trees emerging from the fog

segments.scene_description: The character begins running as the environment transitions from the structured boardwalk to a natural dirt trail. The forest becomes denser with evergreen trees replacing the birch grove, and the ground cover shifts to wild grass and soil.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark foggy forest approaching wooden structure

events.description: character activates flashlight to illuminate the darkening path ahead
small red wooden shed becomes visible through the trees on the right

agents.ego_description: slowing to a walk and using a flashlight to navigate the increasingly dark and foggy forest, approaching a small structure

entered.detail: small weathered red wooden shed with white trim partially obscured by trees

segments.scene_description: Moving slowly through the dense forest, the character activates a flashlight as visibility drops. A small red wooden shed appears through the mist on the right side of the path, serving as a landmark in the otherwise uniform woodland.

agents.ego_description: continuing past the red shed and proceeding deeper into the foggy forest, flashlight illuminating the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes the red shed, which falls behind as the journey continues through the dark, fog-laden forest. The flashlight beam reveals the uneven dirt path ahead as the dense woodland closes in on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty woodland that transforms from a structured boardwalk path into a dense, dark forest. It begins with the character walking along a wooden boardwalk lined by a fence, where white birch trunks stand out against a foggy green undergrowth. As the character breaks into a run, the environment shifts from the boardwalk to a natural dirt trail, with evergreen trees replacing the birch grove and wild grass covering the ground. The scene then grows darker and more claustrophobic, prompting the character to activate a flashlight that illuminates a small red wooden shed appearing through the mist on the right. Finally, the camera passes the shed as the flashlight beam cuts through the heavy fog, revealing an uneven path as the dense woodland closes in from both sides.
